test.details: 12 tests passed across 3 files in @nivalis/utils; @nivalis/ai and @nivalis/web had no test files (passWithNoTests)

typecheck.details: All 3 packages passed TypeScript checks (turbo ts)

lint.details: All 3 packages passed Biome lint checks (49 files total)

nonBlockingIssues.description: tsconfigs don't extend root (but no root tsconfig exists—matches existing pattern)
'build' and 'ts' scripts are identical ('tsc --noEmit') — slightly redundant
Catalog alphabetical ordering: vitest inserted before vaul
Unnecessary vitest devDep in root package.json — turbo delegates to workspace packages
.factory/library/effect-patterns.md documented manual globalValue but code uses official effect/GlobalValue — library updated
composeLayers is typed as 'typeof Layer.mergeAll' — direct alias, could benefit from explicit docs
global-error.tsx missing 'reset' prop — users have no recovery path except full page refresh
sendDefaultPii: true enabled by default — GDPR consideration for sensitive deployments
tunnelRoute '/monitoring' needs middleware exclusion convention documented
Inconsistent empty-string handling: SENTRY_DSN uses '|| undefined' coercion but new optional vars use bare process.env.X

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/effect-patterns.md to reference official 'effect/GlobalValue' module instead of hand-rolled globalThis pattern
Updated build command to include required env vars (BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, DATABASE_URL) as placeholders so future workers don't hit build failures

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing convention: 'All workspace test scripts use --passWithNoTests flag. Do not remove this flag — it allows packages with no test files to pass in CI.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: packages/utils/package.json, packages/ai/package.json, and apps/web/package.json all use 'vitest run --passWithNoTests'. Undocumented convention discovered during setup-vitest review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Next.js convention: 'Sentry tunnel route is configured at /monitoring. Any future middleware.ts MUST exclude /monitoring from its matcher to avoid blocking Sentry event forwarding.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: apps/web/next.config.ts:46 — tunnelRoute: '/monitoring'. Research doc explicitly warns about this. No middleware exists yet, but will be needed for auth (dashboard-layout feature).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add TDD exception to infra-worker and service-worker skills: 'For pure scaffolding or pattern-establishment features with no testable logic, implementing source first then writing tests (or skipping tests) is acceptable.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both setup-shared-packages (infra-worker) and effect-core-setup (service-worker) workers deviated from TDD mandate. The deviation was justified — scaffolding has no logic to test, and pattern features need the API shape defined before tests can be written.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider clarifying service-worker skill scope: it's described as 'Builds Effect.ts services for AI connectors in the @nivalis/ai package' but was used for @nivalis/utils core patterns. Either broaden the scope description or create a separate skill for shared utility patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: effect-core-setup feature used service-worker skill for @nivalis/utils work. Worker noted scope mismatch in skillFeedback.

rejectedObservations.observation: setup-sentry: environment.md already has Sentry env vars documented
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — reviewer confirmed no gap exists
